title: Senior UX Designer — AI Products
description: Axiom AI is building autonomous planning agents that help operations teams manage complex workflows. We're looking for a senior UX designer who understands how to design for AI systems that act on their own — not just chatbots, but agents that plan, execute, and iterate toward goals.
responsibilities: Design the end-to-end experience for our autonomous planning agent — from task input to result delivery
Define agent behavior specifications: what the agent should do, how it should handle uncertainty, and how it should communicate progress
Create and test prototype interactions for agent-driven workflows
Conduct user research with operations teams to understand decision points and trust boundaries
Collaborate with ML engineers to ensure agent outputs align with design expectations
Build and maintain the AI experience patterns library for our team
requirements: 5+ years of UX design experience, with at least 2 years focused on AI or data products
Strong portfolio demonstrating systems thinking and interaction design
Experience designing for uncertainty — showing users when a system is unsure or making probabilistic judgments
Familiarity with agent-based architectures and how LLMs power autonomous behavior
Proficiency with Figma, prototyping tools, and user research methods
Excellent written communication — you can translate complex design decisions into clear specifications
niceToHave: Experience with prompt design or AI evaluation frameworks
Background in operations, logistics, or workflow automation products
Published writing or talks about AI/UX design
Experience with agentic AI tools (LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen)
